definitions: 走调；不在正确音调上（常指唱歌或说话时音不准）

examples.text: Some are even pushing 20 years old. Since then, we've become much more accustomed to songwriters taking liberty by going off tone. But the one big takeaway remains undisputed: Chinese-style dialects are perfect for ballads.
examples.explanation: 这里的 go off tone 表示“走调、偏离正常音调”。句子大意是：从那以后，我们越来越习惯于词曲作者在创作时大胆一点，甚至故意唱得不那么准或偏离常规音调。

source.text: Chinese Music - It's Not Dead, It's Misunderstood...
